_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Product ownership (data ethics) involves defining and create organisation-wide data ethics tools and translate theoretical principles into practice; demonstrate expertise in product management principles and approaches; setting new ways of working and adapt to change; capture and translate user needs into deliverables.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data mesh principles and the role of data product thinking within a federated data ownership model.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-001 (SP, cosine: 0.554), DG-K-009 (DG, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.610). Shared vocabulary: [data, ownership, principles, product]. DDaT-only terms [adapt, approaches, capture, change, create, defining] vs WIDAI-only terms [federated, knowledge, mesh, model, role, thinking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.838, R=0.880). R exceeds P by 0.042 — the WIDAI KSA's 18 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 42 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:26.8%, N:44.8%, C:28.3%). No dominant classification for "Product ownership (data ethics) involves defining and create organisation-wide d" vs "Knowledge of data mesh principles and the role of data product thinking within a" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.617 ≈ STS 0.610 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, ownership, principles, product] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [data, ownership, principles, product]. DDaT-only: [adapt, approaches, capture, change, create, defining]. WIDAI-only: [federated, knowledge, mesh, model, role, thinking].
